name: Angel Food Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan, combine sugar, corn syrup, and vinegar.
2. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the sugar dissolves.
3. Cook without stirring until the temperature reaches 300°F (hard crack stage) on a candy thermometer.
4. Do not overcook. Remove from the heat and quickly stir in baking soda.
5. Pour into a buttered 13-in. x 9-in. x 2-in. baking pan.
6. When cool, break into bite-size pieces.
7. Dip into melted chocolate; place on waxed paper until the chocolate is firm.
8. Store candy tightly covered.
Yield: 1-1/2 pounds
